namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator
{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder> ListHolder => __ListHolder ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __ListHolder, __Create_ListHolder());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder>? __ListHolder;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder> __Create_ListHolder()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_ListHolder,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_ListHolder,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IPropertyShape[] __CreateProperties_ListHolder() => new global::PolyType.Abstractions.IPropertyShape[]
        {
            new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenPropertyShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<int>>
            {
                Position = 0,
                Name = "Items",
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder>)ListHolder,
                PropertyType = List_Int32,
                Getter = static (ref global::TestNamespace.ListHolder obj) => obj.Items,
                Setter = static (ref global::TestNamespace.ListHolder obj, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<int> value) => obj.Items = value,
                MemberInfoFactory = static () => typeof(global::TestNamespace.ListHolder).GetProperty("Items", __BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, typeof(global::System.Collections.Generic.List<int>), global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsGetterPublic = true,
                IsSetterPublic = true,
                IsGetterNonNullable = true,
                IsSetterNonNullable = true,
            },
        };

        private global::PolyType.Abstractions.IConstructorShape __CreateConstructor_ListHolder()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenConstructorShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder, global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.EmptyArgumentState>
            {
                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.ListHolder>)ListHolder,
                DefaultConstructor = static () => new global::TestNamespace.ListHolder(),
                MethodBaseFactory = static () => typeof(global::TestNamespace.ListHolder).GetConstructor(__BindingFlags_Instance_All, null, global::System.Type.EmptyTypes, null),
                IsPublic = true,
            };
        }
    }
